About

Building one AI health system instead of five disconnected tools.

One intelligent platform that unifies nutrition, fitness, and wellness — powered by artificial intelligence that truly understands you. Enerium is designed for people who want a single place to track food, fitness, hydration, and long-term progress without jumping across fragmented apps.

Why Enerium exists

Most health apps solve one narrow problem. Enerium focuses on the whole operating system of daily health decisions.

How AI helps

AI is used for food recognition, adaptive coaching, meal planning, and pattern detection across your health data.

What users get

A single mobile experience for action, tracking, and insight instead of a stack of loosely connected services.

Core product pillars

Nutrition Intelligence

Track every calorie and macro with precision. AI-powered food recognition analyzes your meals instantly from a single photo.

Fitness & Activity

Steps, workouts, runs, training videos, and multi-week marathon programs. Synced with Apple Health and Google Fit.

Smart Hydration

Intelligent water tracking with adaptive reminders that escalate based on urgency. Never forget to hydrate.

AI Kitchen

Smart fridge inventory, AI recipe suggestions from your ingredients, automatic meal planning, and shopping lists.

Deep Analytics

Comprehensive progress tracking with custom date ranges, trend analysis, body metrics, and exportable insights.

Trust and transparency

Because Enerium operates in the health space, privacy, legal clarity, and product transparency matter. Review our policies or contact the team directly if you need more information.
